preconditions: PB-002 remains blocked and ADR-0009 remains unresolved
source-strategy owner identifies candidate source baselines or explicitly records that no baseline is selected
no Servo-derived or other browser-engine code enters a release path
queue status remains proposed; this specified manifest is non-executable
a named owner and named independent reviewer replace the role placeholders before this manifest can become ready
acceptance_criteria: ADR9-EV-001 through ADR9-EV-018 each have owner-reviewed evidence, an explicit missing output, or a recorded blocker

the first real ADR-0009 decision review starts from the checked no-claim decision-review template and replaces null selected option, source baseline, feature profile, owner reviewer, independent reviewer, and false decision status flags with owner-reviewed evidence or explicit blocked status
the selected source baseline and provenance policy are recorded or the lack of selection is explicitly retained

license, advisory, SBOM, native package, generated-output, unsafe, FFI, local compatibility corpus HTTPS/browser execution beyond the checked harness plan and WPT/Test262 denominator, performance, security, maintenance, and public-claim impacts are synchronized
the ADR-0009 decision draft states accepted, rejected, or still-blocked status without promoting unsupported claims
validation passes without weakening any source-strategy gate
negative_tests: no release code imports Chromium, WebKit, Gecko, Servo, Electron, CEF, system webview, or remote-rendering code

the checked no-claim decision-review template is not cited as an accepted ADR, source baseline, source adoption, component approval, release-code authorization, PB-002 readiness promotion, or implementation evidence
no dependency, component, compatibility, security, performance, memory, or release claim is introduced by evidence presence alone

rollback.strategy: Revert only the task-specific documentation and registry diffs if owner review rejects the source-strategy packet.
